positive: An intricate, stylized celestial map overlayed on a grouping of bioluminescent flora and fauna. The scene features stylized, clean silhouettes of crescent moons, constellations, shooting stars, and fantastical leaves/flowers. The style is a detailed, vintage etching mixed with neon glow accents, achieving high contrast against a deep indigo and midnight blue background. The composition is centralized, forming a perfect mandala-like pattern, highly scalable for apparel printing. Excellent line work, sharp details, vaporwave aesthetic with natural elements, clean vector art influence, high saturation.
negative: blurry, watermark, text, logo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, messy lines, artifacts, lowres, grain, grainy, cropped, dirty, amateur, photographic, realism, portrait, human figures
